title: DocWright Profile Schema — org-operations
description: Frontmatter validation schema for document types in this profile. Each key in documentTypes is a document type name; its value is a JSON Schema object.

issue.description: A reported bug, feature request, or infrastructure issue. Stored in issues/ directory. Flows through triage → scope-check → awaiting-proposal → proposal-linked → resolved/deferred/duplicate.

demand_count.description: Number of times this issue has been reported or voted for

milestone.description: Only set after proposal is linked

triage_date.description: When issue was triaged (set when status: triaged)

triage_by.description: Who triaged the issue (set when status: triaged)

triage_notes.description: Assessment of the issue's nature and priority (required when status: triaged)

scope_check_date.description: When issue was scope-checked (set when status: scope-checked)

scope_check_by.description: Who scope-checked the issue (set when status: scope-checked)

scope_assessment.description: Assessment of whether issue is in scope and any overlaps (required when status: scope-checked)

scope_decision.description: Outcome of scope check (required when status: scope-checked)

scope_notes.description: If duplicate: link to canonical; if out-of-scope: justification; if deferred: target milestone

proposal_source.description: Path to proposal that addresses this issue (set when status: proposal-linked)

plan.description: Filename of plan this issue is tracked by

cross_link.description: Full path to plan (for wikilink and bidirectional reference)

plan.description: An execution plan for delivering a proposal's objectives. Stored in plans/ directory.

parent_plan.description: Filename of parent plan (omit if top-level)

parent_deliverable.description: Row number in parent's Deliverables table

tracked_by.description: Issue filenames or paths tracked by this plan

deliverables.description: Workable deliverables; each becomes an issue at plan-start

research.description: A structured investigation into a question or decision area. Captured in research/ directory.

question.description: One-sentence research question this document investigates

related_research.description: Other research documents on adjacent questions
